Sport

Men's Basketball Schedule Roster Coaches Stats (Sortable) Additional Links

2025-26 Men's Basketball Roster

23 Parker Smith

  • Position Guard
  • Ht./Wt. 6-0 / 180
  • Class Freshman
  • Hometown Carlisle, Pa.
  • Major Finance (Personal Financial Planning)
  • Highschool Carlisle
  • Bio
  • Related
  • Stats

Biography

Carlisle High School: Totaled four varsity letters for the Thundering Herd under head coach Andre Anderson…competed at the club level for Team Pennsylvania under coach Sam Freeburn…a two-time Mid-Penn Commonwealth First Team All-Star Selection (2023-25)…a two-time Big 15 Selection (2023-25)…a two-time All-Carlisle Sentinel First Team (2023-25)…All Defensive Team (2024-25)…netted 1,480 career points (sixth all-time in program history)…a four-year starter…averaged 24.6 points (second in Mid Penn) and 2.8 steals (first in Mid-Penn) per game as a senior…led the conference in scoring as a junior (23.6 ppg)…scored a single-game career high of 41 points against Harrisburg…maintained a 3.9 GPA…also competed in lacrosse and track & field…holds three school track & field records (400, 4x100 and 4x400)…Mid-Penn Conference Track & Field Champion…District 3 and state track & field medalist.
 
About Smith: Full name is Parker Smith…is the son of Scott and Jessica Smith…father is a 1997 Shippensburg grad.
